channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Screenbound launches September 10
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

Also available via Game Pass.

Dual-world action adventure Screenbound will launch for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam and Microsoft Store on September 10, publisher and developer Crescent Moon Games and publisher Digital Pajamas announced. It will also be available via Game Pass.

Here is an overview of the game, via Crescent Moon Games:

About

You’ve discovered the Qboy, a strange device you found in your mom’s garage. This handheld console is unlike any other because when you power it on, reality splits!

Screenbound is a dual-world action adventure where a 2D handheld game and the 3D world around it exist at the same time — and you control both.

Embark on an adventure through this unknown world, switching between the realistic 3D world and a retro-styled 2D world, solving puzzles and defeating enemies while uncovering an exciting story in an unknown world.

Screenbound blends retro-inspired pixel art with a stylized 3D world and looks to bring a new and exciting take on the platforming genre, challenging you to take information from the 3D world you’re in, and the 2D world on your screen, to overcome the 5D challenges put in front of you.

This isn’t just a game. It’s a quantum experiment and you’re the variable.

Key Features

  • Dual-Dimensional Gameplay – Control both 3D and 2D versions of yourself simultaneously. Your actions mirror across realities, but the rules don’t.
  • Challenging Puzzles – Solve different puzzles that require shifting perspective, timing and logic across two planes of existence.
  • Unlock New Tools and Skills – Unlock new abilities as you progress that give you even more ways to solve the puzzles
  • Uncover the Story and Secrets – Explore offbeat areas and discover a unique story through environmental storytelling.
  • Dual Focus – Some objects, enemies, and platforms only exist in one world so stay alert!


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/screenbound-launches-september-10
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: ‘Slap-and-solve adventure’ game Slap Out Of It! announced for consoles, PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC

From Floor Plan developer Turbo Button.

Floor Plan developer Turbo Button has announced Slap Out Of It!, a “slap-and-solve adventure” game set in a “slapstick comedy sandbox packed with silly puzzles.” It will launch for unspecified consoles and PC via Steam in 2027.

“Our team is dedicated to interactive comedy and celebrating the art of dumb,” said Turbo Button co-founder Holden Link in a press release. “Up until now, we’ve been known for making a bunch of silly [virtual reality] games, but Slap Out of It! is our first time stepping away from [virtual reality] entirely. It builds upon our past work, while exploring lots of new ideas, and it’s all meticulously hand crafted to keep you thinking and laughing at the same time.”

  • ❮
  • ❯

Here is an overview of the game, via Turbo Button:

About

Slap Out Of It! is a slap-and-solve adventure that stretches your wits and your noodly arms in all directions. Explore impossible towers where every floor is a comedy sandbox of secrets. Meet strange characters and solve (or add to) their problems with a personal touch. The power to change everything is in your hands.

Story

Our world is broken… but at Puzzl, we’re putting it back together piece by piece – better than before! Join our team of PuzzPals and help us solve the world’s problems with a personal touch. But first, our CEO needs some help with a very important mission. You’re not afraid of heights, right?

An Interactive Comedy Sandbox

You see that mountain? You can slap it. Well, you could if this game had mountains. Everything within reach of your stretchy arms is satisfyingly interactive and responsive to your touch with animation, sound, and haptics. Every background detail is intentional and worthy of your attention—so explore and slap everything, because you never know what might happen. Maybe we’ll add mountains.

Lateral and Vertical Thinking

Lean on the skills you’ve learned from point-and-clicks to SLAP-AND-SOLVE. Use your elevator to travel between floors, gather items in your fanny pack, and make logical leaps as you unravel how every floor and their inhabitants are connected. And if you get stuck, keep on slapping or ask the operator for some intel to help you along.

A “Floor Plan” adventure

Slap Out Of It! is inspired and adapted from “Floor Plan,” the hit VR escape game series. It has been dramatically expanded with all-new gameplay and secrets to discover, and meticulously redesigned from the ground up for keyboard and controller. Please note that this is not a virtual reality game and does not have any virtual reality support.

Key Features

  • A comedy sandbox with puzzles and surprises hidden behind every slap.
  • Think with your hands to solve and progress through interconnected escape rooms.
  • Embrace cartoon logic as you explore, touch, and smack everything in sight.
  • Meet a huge cast of bizarre characters, and solve (or become) their problems.
  • Six to 10 handcrafted hours of gloriously stupid jokes and memorable “aha” moments.
  • A Floor Plan adventure—inspired by the hit escape game series, now with 100 percent less virtual reality.

Watch the announcement trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/slap-and-solve-adventure-game-slap-out-of-it-announced-for-consoles-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Interactive mystery thriller Apple Crumble announced for PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC

From Duck Detective developer Happy Broccoli Games.

Duck Detective series developer Happy Broccoli Games has announced Apple Crumble, a fully-voiced interactive mystery thriller inspired by titles like MOUTHWASHING and Knives Out. It will launch for PC via Steam in 2026.

Here is an overview of the game, via Happy Broccoli Games:

About

SOMEONE’S TAKING A SLICE!

Apple Crumble is a suspenseful interactive mystery set during your grandma’s 84th birthday party. One of the guests is out to knife your Nan, but the question is—who?

It’s down to you to uncover the truth. Explore your childhood home, reconnect with your dysfunctional family, and work out who you can trust before it’s time for tea in this short, twisty thriller from the creators of Duck Detective.

Featuring a fully voiced cast of suspects:

  • Your beloved grandma
  • Your stressed-out mum
  • Your midlife crisis uncle
  • The weird man in your bedroom
  • You

Key Features

  • 60 to 90 minute long mystery thriller walking simulator.
  • Fully voice-acted.

Watch the announcement trailer below.

Announce Teaser Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/interactive-mystery-thriller-apple-crumble-announced-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: N PLUS INFINITY TIMES TWO announced for PS5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC
item.content:encoded:
Metanet Software has announced N PLUS INFINITY TIMES TWO, its latest physics-based high-speed platforming game in the N series and the “ultimate virtual couch party game.” It will launch for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC via Steam in 2027.

Here is an overview of the game, via Metanet Software:

N PLUS INFINITY TIMES TWO has remixed the N series from the ground up with its unmistakable formula now perfected for virtual athletics.

Master momentum as you dash across beautifully handcrafted minimalist levelscapes, avoiding obstacles and dodging deviously designed enemies. N PLUS INFINITY TIMES TWO hands would-be warriors infinite replayability and the highest level of competition yet in the N series, in this multi-layered multiplayer parkour platformer.

Originating as a flash game, N brought peerless platforming to over 100 million web surfers in the mid-aughts, with future entries in the franchise further refining the game’s tight, hardcore mechanics while folding in more cooperative play and competitive game modes. The new N PLUS INFINITY TIMES TWO is the cumulation of more than twenty years of experience, and Metanet’s take on a party platforming game where the problem posed by every level is a playground waiting for players.

Even things that aren’t your enemies can kill you—take fall damage, get pancaked on the ceiling, sabotage other players and manipulate the enemies in a deadly ballet of movement as you dash to victory. A menacing menagerie of meanies react to your every move in this smooth and unique platformer from the indie platforming trailblazers at Metanet.

  • ❮
  • ❯

The return of the “World’s Best Platformer” (TM) brings players multiple game modes perfect for testing their reflexes with multi-layered parkour platforming action: Five fresh flavors of online (and local) running (and jumping) await.

  • Trials and Cooperative Play – N PLUS INFINITY TIMES TWO will still have the staples of the N franchise with the return of Trials, a reworking of the solo and hardcore modes of previous N games, and cooperative play, along with a remixed version of Racing (lovingly referred to as Rocket Murder Time) as well as two other brand-new competitive game modes that will test friendships in some of the platforming’s most pulse-pounding action: One-Up and Team Tag.
  • Races – Races in N PLUS INFINITY TIMES TWO keep up the blazing fast action fans will remember from past games, pushing up to four players to reach the exit of a level as quickly as possible, collecting gold along the way to boost their score, with one distinctive change. It’s not unlike a faster, sleeker version of Fall Guys, except when you reach the finish line you can blast a bazooka to blow your opponents back to the starting line.
  • One-Up – N PLUS INFINITY TIMES TWO‘s first new game mode, pushes players to constantly perform better in fast-paced push-your-luck elimination contests. Get the most gold and reach the exit faster than someone else, and you’ll stay in the game. One trip up spells the end though, leaving you waiting for the next round.
  • Team Tag – Introduces the crown jewel of N PLUS INFINITY TIMES TWO as teams of two think cooperatively and coordinate strategically to hunt each other down. Ninjas must evade Hunters while collecting gold to raise their score, with each team switching roles between rounds to see who can earn the most and survive the longest. A deceptively simple concept, Team Tag quickly becomes a fast-paced game of chess as each team tries to outmaneuver the other.

Elevating the N PLUS INFINITY TIMES TWO experience are the franchise’s staple visual and auditory delights. Visuals consist of Metanet’s trademark minimalist style that can be swapped between dozens of different color palettes with their own tracing and particle effects that make each level and ninja pop off the screen. Players can also customize their own ninja with Funlockable™ cosmetics that are earned by simply playing.

In signature Metanet style, the game’s soundtrack comes with a megakiller globe-spanning soundtrack of 50+ hand-selected artists like Dusky and Cameo Blush, providing the perfect audio soundscape for precision running, jumping and failing.

Sourced by hand by Metanet from the smallest alleyways of Bandcamp, the soundtrack’s curation spans musicians around the globe, fueling an eclectic and offensively tasteful mix of electronic audio delights across a multitude of genres, subgenres and sub-sub genres.

Watch the announcement trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/n-plus-infinity-times-two-announced-for-ps5-xbox-series-switch-2-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Messhof announces 2D platforming survival game Blood Dungeon for PS5, Xbox Series, and PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

Due out in the late summer.

Nidhogg developer Messhof has announced Blood Dungeon, a 2D platforming survival game due out for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam in the late summer. A demo is available now for PC.

“I like to sketch ideas in Game Maker once in a while to get them out of my head,” says Messhof co-founder Mark Essen in a press release. “While it’s been a while since I’ve done the art for a Messhof project, I still enjoy working in 2D for fun side projects. This game started as a little weekend project that I shared with friends and lent itself to being something I could scratch at over the years as a way to wind down at night. The lack of pressure and small windows of time that defined 90% of the development kept it fun and drove a lot of the design decisions. I had a little $50 tablet with a screen and I did a lot of animation in the car if I had to wait around for something or other.”

  • ❮
  • ❯

Here is an overview of the game, via Messhoft:

About

From the creators of Nidhogg comes a game about 2D platforming survival. You’ll have to parkour your way around treacherous dungeons to kite monsters while gathering blood and powerups.

Survive a run, take the bones you’ve earned to the Bone Shop, and get stronger.

Complete quests to unlock upgrades, arenas, skins, and more.

Key Features

  • Nine unlockable playable characters with different traits and weapons.
  • Six unlockable unique survival arenas.
  • Over 100 enemy types.
  • Over 100 quests to complete.
  • Over 100 unlockable weapons and upgrades.
  • Dynamic “dungeon dnb” soundtrack by Thomas Hooey.

Watch the announcement trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/messhof-announces-2d-platforming-survival-game-blood-dungeon-for-ps5-xbox-series-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: HITMAN World of Assassination Elusive Target mission ‘The Wizard’ starring Wiz Khalifa now available
item.content:encoded:
IO Interactive has announced HITMAN World of Assassination limited-time Elusive Target mission “The Wizard,” starring rapper Wiz Khalifa, which will be available for free, both in-game and via the free demo of the game, from today until July 5.

Here are the details:

The Wizard: Available for Free Starting June 5

In the new Elusive Target mission, revealed during Summer Games Fest, Agent 47 is tasked with the elimination of Taylor Graves, nicknamed “The Wizard” for his seemingly alchemic touch. Everything he pursued, fighting or finance, turned to gold. Originally a star boxer, he became fascinated by eastern philosophy, which led to being introduced to the world of Muay Thai. With his buried rage, the brutality of the sport enticed him, and he proved himself a worthy fighter. He has been invited to attend a duel at the Ark Society’s headquarters on the Isle of Sgail. His opponent is fellow Ark Society member Tim Quinn, CEO of Quantum Leap. Agent 47’s mission is to do everything in his power to keep Quinn safe and stop Graves from “winning the fight”.

The mission revisits a familiar location and setting, built around a completely new character, and new dialogues and elements. In the past months, the HITMAN community has shown strong interest in the gameplay experience on Isle of Sgàil, this new Elusive Target represents an opportunity to reintroduce that mission in a fresh way. With more than one million active players engaging with HITMAN content every month, community feedback remains an important part of how we evolve the game, and IO Interactive is looking forward to players stepping back into the ring.

The Wizard Pack ($4.99 / €4.99 / £3.99)

The Wizard Pack, a brand new DLC pack themed after the latest Elusive Target, is also available, starting today and on all platforms**.

The Wizard Pack includes:

  • Permanent Access to The Pugilist – A Two-level Arcade contract featuring The Wizard Elusive Target.
  • The Zig-Zag Suit
  • TAC ‘N’ Yellow
  • Blunt Knife
  • Beatdown Boombox
  • A set of four Freelancer Safehouse cosmetics items, inspired by the Elusive Target mission

Season of the Wizard: Live Updates, Free for HITMAN World of Assasination Players

A brand-new roadmap will also begin today bringing both added and returning content for players to enjoy. With three new challenges, two new Featured Contracts, three new Twitch Drops, returning Elusive Targets, IOI Account Rewards, Crossover Rewards and the return of the Drop Elusive Target ft. Dimitri Vegas and the Eminem vs. Slim Shady Elusive Target, along with its Eminem vs. Slim Shady Pack, available on stores for a limited time only, there will be plenty of targets for Agent 47 to take on!

World Champions Pack ($4.99 / €4.99 / £3.99)

A new downloadable content “World Champions Pack” featuring a variety of outfits, weapons, and gear inspired by iconic sport disciplines from around the world, each designed to bring a competitive edge to your missions, is available starting today on all platforms**.

The World Champions Pack includes:

  • MVP Coach Tracksuit
  • Home Kit
  • Away Kit
  • UL-LR Sport Rifle
  • Aircrush 73
  • Tactician’s Briefcase
  • Consolation Prize
  • Gold Medal
  • The Trickshot Duck
  • A new “Locker Room” cosmetic for the Freelancer Safehouse’s basement wardrobe.

In addition, as highly requested by the HITMAN community and as part of our commitment to bring back currently unobtainable items, this pack also grants select items as a special gift.

HITMAN World of Assassination is available now for PlayStation 5 with PlayStation VR2 support, Xbox Series, Switch 2, PlayStation 4, Xbox One, Switch via cloud streaming, PC via Steam and Epic Games Store, and iOS.

Watch a new trailer below.

The Wizard (feat. Wiz Khalifa) Elusive Target Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/hitman-world-of-assassination-elusive-target-mission-the-wizard-starring-wiz-khalifa-now-available
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Clutch ‘Cinematic’ trailer, cast announced
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

Tosin Cole, Little Simz, Peter Serafinowicz, and more to star.

Maverick Games has released the cinematic trailer for newly announced open-world action driving game Clutch</em, revealing the game’s “star-studded cast.”

“At its heart, Clutch is about the bond between driver and machine, and the lengths we’ll go to protect the people who matter most,” said Maverick Games founder and creative director Mike Brown in a press release. “We’ve injected real emotional stakes into every race, chase and getaway because we believe action-driving games can make players feel more than speed alone. Clutch combines cinematic storytelling, high-stakes action and a deeply personal journey to create a new kind of open-world driving experience brought to life by this incredibly talented cast.”

  • ❮
  • ❯

Here is an overview of the game, via Maverick Games:

The immersive narrative in Clutch puts players in the driver’s seat as Theo Martial, played by Tosin Cole (Supacell, Doctor Who), a heroic driver living a double life competing in elite sanctioned racing by day, and descending into an underground street racing scene by night. Alongside his sister Cass Martial, played by Little Simz (Top Boy, Venom: Let There Be Carnage), Theo must shed light on a shadow cast over the French Riviera and its iconic racing scene. Additionally, actors Peter Serafinowicz (Guardians of the Galaxy, Shaun of the Dead), Gregory Montel (Call My Agent!, The Killer), Kieron Moore (Boots, Code of Silence) and Jane Perry (Returnal, HITMAN) will take on leading roles in Clutch‘s cinematic story written by acclaimed Skins co-creator Jamie Brittain.

The stage of Clutch is set during the Riviera 1000 (R1K) racing tournament, the single most prestigious event in all motorsports. Star driver Theo Martial (Tosin Cole) is on track to round out his extraordinary rise to success under the tutelage of his adoptive father, previous R1K superstar Ludo Martial (Gregory Montel). But in the final moments of the race, a terrible accident occurs, changing the course of the R1K and the dreams of Theo, Ludo and Theo’s sister, teammate and rival, Cass (Little Simz). George McBride (Peter Serafinowicz), the custodian of the R1K, shocks the racing world by announcing the introduction of a new technology to ensure this tragedy is never repeated. A divide among R1K drivers leads Theo to the Midnight Collective, an underground street racing subculture lighting up the streets of the French Riviera. Trouble continues to tail Theo, and when he seeks the help of fixer Emery Whitman (Jane Perry), the underbelly of the R1K is smashed wide open. Players must use their thirst for speed, and ingenuity to break the rules, uncover clues and getaway in style to unmask those really pulling the strings.

Clutch‘s expansive open-world world is inspired by the iconic and glamorous Mediterranean coastline of the French Riviera. Featuring miles of diverse roads and terrain, players will weave through vibrant city streets, conquer dramatic mountain switchbacks and unleash top speed on breathtaking coastal highways. From professional racing to action-packed underground race-and-chase sandbox gameplay, every road offers new opportunities for rivalry, pursuit and escape in a world where speed and style collide.

In Clutch, players will compete for position, reputation and rewards while navigating shifting alliances, escalating pursuits and rival crews across a living player-versus-player-versus-environment action-driving world. The open-world sandbox unleashes blockbuster action and unscripted chaos in every high-speed getaway. Clutch‘s proprietary physics engine and deep vehicle personalization system allow players to build cars defined as much by identity and style as raw performance. Players can create a true one-of-one car and the ride of their dreams in Clutch, being rewarded equally for both creative flair and finishing position.

Clutch is due out for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC in spring 2027.

Watch the trailer below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

Cinematic Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/clutch-cinematic-trailer-cast-announced
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds future DLC packs and SONIC PICO PARK announced
item.content:encoded:
SEGA has announced new collaboration downloadable content coming to Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds, as well as the licensed indie game SONIC PICO PARK developed by TECOPARK.

New content coming to Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds includes:

  • Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Pack (July 2026) – race as all four iconic Turtles – Leonardo, Donatello, Raphael, and Michelangelo – with new vehicles, courses, and new Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles-inspired music tracks.
  • Avatar Pack (October 2026) – Bend the elements as fan-favorite characters, Aang and Katara with new vehicles, courses and Avatar-inspired music tracks, emotes, and more.
  • Season Pass Two (Year Two) – Six new downloadable content Packs, featuring intense courses, larger-than-life characters, and more, with more details to be revealed later in 2026.
    • Godzilla Pack
    • EVANGELION Pack

And here is an overview of SONIC PICO PARK, which will be available for PC via Steam:

SONIC PICO PARK is a new Sonic-licensed game inspired by the hit indie game PICO PARK, featuring its signature puzzle-driven cooperative action—all with a Sonic twist! Fans can expect iconic Sonic characters, levels, and special gameplay moments, with plenty of chaos to go around!

More details on SONIC PICO PARK will be revealed soon.

Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds is available now for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, PlayStation 4, Xbox One, Switch, and PC via Steam and Epic Games Store.

Watch a new trailer below.

Summer Game Fest 2026 Trailer

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/sonic-racing-crossworlds-future-dlc-packs-and-sonic-pico-park-announced
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: 007 First Light sales top 2.7 million in first week, year one content roadmap announced
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

More TacSim missions, Bawma content, and more.

Total sales for 007 First Light surpassed 2.7 million copies in the first week of release, developer IO Interactive announced.

007 First Light launched for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam and Epic Games Store on May 27. A Switch 2 version is due out later this summer.

IO interactive also announced the game’s year one roadmap:

New TacSim Content

Tactical Simulation Mode will receive a range of new content throughout the year, introducing gameplay challenges that test players’ skill and resourcefulness. Players will return to Kensington in The Workshop and to Slovakia’s mountain slopes in the Aston Martin Valhalla, with more TacSim updates arriving regularly over the coming months.

Another update will transport players back to Aleph’s dangerous black market in Mauritania, where players can prove their driving skills in off-road encounters. Players will also head back to The Pearl, Vietnam’s luxury resort, where a new enemy has taken control of the facility, with Bond tasked to take him down. Finally, new intelligence suggests there may be more lurking beneath the surface than initially believed within Webb Industries. MI6 has uncovered an unknown piece of technology, leading Bond to investigate the trail of what may become one of Bond’s deadliest opponents yet.

Expanding the World of Espionage

Following events in Mauritania, an unexpected alliance forms between MI6 and Pirate King Bawma, with the Pirate King seeking MI6’s help with a sensitive issue that requires Bond’s personal involvement. To support Bond in these new challenges, Q is developing a new gadget: the Even G2 display smart glasses from Even Realities, opening up new gameplay opportunities.

Regular Upcoming Updates

Throughout Year One, players can expect regular TacSim updates featuring gadget upgrades, new weapons, leaderboard challenges, additional intel, new enemies, cosmetics, returning vehicles, and new gameplay scenarios. IO Interactive is committed to evolving the 007 First Light experience content that keeps gameplay fresh and engaging. Finally, New Game+ is also being explored to add even more replayability to the main campaign.

Nintendo Switch 2

007 First Light will launch on Nintendo Switch 2 this Summer 2026, bringing the full Bond experience to Nintendo players. The release on Nintendo Switch 2 will enable players to enjoy the cinematic espionage adventure wherever they go, delivering the complete 007 First Light experience in both handheld and docked modes.

Watch a new trailer below. View a new set of images at the gallery.

Year One Content Trailer

Bawma Will Return

Images

  • ❮
  • ❯


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/007-first-light-sales-top-2-7-million-in-first-week-year-one-content-roadmap-announced
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: 33 Immortals launches June 10
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • Xbox Series

Cooperative roguelike action game leaving Early Access after two years.

Cooperative roguelike action game 33 Immortals will leave Early Access and launch for Xbox Series and PC via Steam, Epic Games Store, and Microsoft Store on June 10, developer Thunder Lotus Games announced.

33 Immortals first launched in Early Access for Xbox Series and PC via Epic Games Store and Microsoft Store on March 18, 2024. It is also available via Game Pass.

“We’re incredibly excited to finally release the full version of 33 Immortals,” said creative director Stephan Logier in a press release. “Version 1.0 represents everything we wanted the game to become, and we can’t wait for players to discover the complete journey, face the ultimate boss, and explore everything the full release has to offer.”

Here is an overview of the game, via Thunder Lotus Games:

After over a year of community feedback and optimization during Early Access, version 1.0 introduces the complete 33 Immortals experience, including all three fully playable worlds, the long-awaited ultimate final-boss encounter, and a variety of new content and improvements throughout the game.

Players will now be able to experience the full progression of 33 Immortals from beginning to end, uncovering new challenges, enemies, and mechanics across each world. The final release also includes balancing updates, gameplay polish, quality-of-life improvements, and expanded customization options.

Watch a new trailer bleow.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/33-immortals-launches-june-10
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Among Us Story: On Guard announced for PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC

A new standalone adventure game.

Inenrsloth has announced Among Us Story: On Guard, a new standalone adventure game set in the ,em>Among Us universe. It will be available for PC via Steam. A release date was not announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

Welcome to MIRA Research & Development! Take a step into our simulator to start the new Crewmate training program. Your first task? Become Guard! You’re in charge of shipwide security and ensuring the crew gets to their destination safely. Everything will be fine, provided an Impostor doesn’t start murdering Crewmates!

The Task

Hypothetically, if any murders happen, you’ll need to prove your innocence and find the Impostor before it can get to the rest of the crew… and you. We advise solving murders with The MIRA Method!

  • M – eet the Among Us universe in a whole new way. Step into the world of the Guard, tasked with maintaining security on the ship. You’re the first and last line of defense against a universe that wants to kill the crew.
  • I – dentify the Impostor. You’ve trained for this. Murders? False accusations? This might be difficult for someone who hasn’t already been honed into a detective mastermind by years of Emergency Meetings. Admin didn’t raise, emotionally neglect, and eventually abandon a quitter.
  • R – eap the rewards of your investigation. Who is an Impostor (there might be more than you think) and which Crewmates can you trust? Inside the simulation, explore three unique endings that are paramount to improving safety for the good of all Crewmates. Probably.
  • A – nd complete tasks. As per the Crewmate Handbook you definitely agreed to, murder and murder accusations do not absolve you of your workplace duties. Complete tasks to progress through your mission and discover clues to build your case against the Impostor.

The Crew

Meet a colorful cast of Crewmates and find out which one of them puts the “I” in “Impostor.” Have fun getting to know everyone! (Try to ignore that any of them might be plotting your death.)

  • Operator – That’s you! Help MIRA with their new Crewmate training program as you navigate life as Guard.
  • Management – Your lovable, caring, committed, always-approachable boss who might have written this description.
  • Guard – A hard-boiled private eye you control as part of the simulation. Cynical and suspicious – exactly who you need in charge of shipwide security.
  • Cook – Sweet, innocent, kind, and just a few days from retirement. Definitely not about to get murdered by an Impostor…
  • Scientist – Always going on about plants and science and stuff. Just be careful they don’t talk you… to death!
  • Engineer – Wrote a long bullet-pointed summary of their skills and responsibilities , but we didn’t read it.
  • Doctor – When not working, they’re a streamer. (Sometimes even when they are working, they’re a streamer.)
  • Captain – Not really into confrontation, but they are into care-frontation!

Watch the announcement trailer below.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/among-us-story-on-guard-announced-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Lords of the Fallen II adds Steam version, launches this fall
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

"The Battle for Thorngar" trailer released.

Soulslike action RPG Lords of the Fallen II will launch for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam and Epic Games Store this fall 2026, publisher CI Games and developer Hexworks announced. The Steam version is newly announced.

Here are the latest details, via CI Games:

One of the newly revealed locations is Ysiguen, a sprawling biome partly inspired by Asian mythology, sporting grand pagoda towers twisted by demonic forces, horned courtesans, and defended by Lingao the Souring Storm – a towering, lightning-infused dragon.

Arriving hand in hand with the new region, the trailer also revealed the brand new katana-based weapon class, delivering one of the community’s most popular requests alongside the previously confirmed addition of scythes. Players also got an expanded look at the new roster of NPCs aiding the player in their crusade against evil, as well as the Lords of Darkness that will undoubtedly stand in their way.

  • ❮
  • ❯

CI Games is aiming to deliver a “bolder, braver, and bloodier” evolution of its flagship franchise with Lords of the Fallen II, building directly upon extensive community feedback from the 2023 title and the lessons learned through more than 70 post-launch updates. The sequel pushes the series further into its signature aggressive combat style with a substantially improved combat system designed to feel faster, more responsive, and more satisfying than ever before, with brutal executions, expanded combat abilities and visceral dismemberments.

Lords of the Fallen II will also feature a richer and more varied world, a significantly expanded enemy roster with biome-specific factions, more dynamic boss encounters, shared-progression co-op available at launch and a more immersive Umbral realm.

Watch the new trailer below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

“The Battle for Thorngar” Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/lords-of-the-fallen-ii-adds-steam-version-launches-this-fall
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Mafia: The Old Country expansion ‘Man of Honor’ announced
item.content:encoded:
Publisher 2K and developer Hangar 13 have announced Mafia: The Old Country expansion “Man of Honor.” It will launch on August 14.

“Man of Honor” features two new chapters in Enzo’s story as he crosses paths with Ennio Salieri, the future Don of the Salieri crime family and main antagonist of Mafia: Definitive Edition, as well as additional content for Free Ride mode.

Here is an overview of the expansion, via 2K:

Experience Two New Chapters in Enzo’s Story

Set in Sicily during the winter of 1905, Enzo Favara has proven himself a reliable soldier of the Torrisi crime family in the months since his initiation. Now, the Don entrusts him and Cesare with a delicate assignment of assisting Ennio Salieri, a man of honor recently released from prison and intent on reclaiming what is his.

At Salieri’s side, Enzo is drawn deeper into the volatile underworld of the Valle Dorata, where loyalty is tested, debts are settled, and every move carries weight.

Enzo’s story continues across two new chapters, featuring fresh environments, weapons, vehicles, and Charms. These chapters explore a previously unseen period during Enzo’s height as a soldato.

  • ❮
  • ❯

Additional Free Ride Content

In the additional content for Free Ride mode, players will team up with Salieri to earn big by taking on a new set of extreme challenges, and discover new collectibles and never-before-seen locations.

Salieri acts as the player’s point of contact for these new Free Ride activities, which will test the skills of even the most elite mafiosi.

Mafia: The Old Country is now available for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam.

Watch the announcement trailer below. View a new set of images at the gallery.

DLC “Man of Honor” Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/mafia-the-old-country-expansion-man-of-honor-announced
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: STEINS;GATE RE:BOOT introduces additional ‘Gamma Worldline’ route
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS4
  • PS5
  • Switch
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

A new story route created for the game.

MAGES. and Spike Chunsoft have released a new trailer for STEINS;GATE RE:BOOT introducing the “Gamma Worldline” route—a new story route created for the game.

Here is an overview of the new route, via Spike Chunsoft:

About the Additional Route

After enduring countless brutal ordeals, protagonist Rintaro Okabe finds himself cast into a new worldline. In this world, the time machine was never completed, and D-Mails, messages capable of altering the past, do not exist. Vastly diverging from the worldline he knows, Okabe struggles to comprehend the situation. Seeking help, he rushes to the lab, only to be met with hostile stares from the very lab members who should be his friends.

In this additional route, the story depicts a Gamma Worldline, where the persona of Hououin Kyouma, the driving force behind the main story, never existed. Instead, Okabe dirties his hands alongside Moeka Kiryu and is confronted with loneliness and despair.

A new kind of brutality, unlike anything seen before, awaits both Rintaro Okabe and the player.

We invite you to see this story through to its end.

STEINS;GATE RE:BOOT will launch for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, PlayStation 4, Switch, and PC via Steam on August 20 in Japan. The Xbox Series and PC versions will launch on the same day in the west, while the PlayStation 5, Switch 2, PlayStation 4, and Switch versions will launch on October 29.

Watch the trailer below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

New Route Intro Trailer

English

Japanese

Screenshots

  • ❮
  • ❯


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/steinsgate-reboot-introduces-additional-gamma-worldline-route
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Swords of Legends confirmed for PS5, Xbox Series, and PC; ‘Gameplay’ trailer
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

First look at the combat of the cinematic action RPG.

Aurogon Shanghai have released a new trailer for action adventure RPG Swords of Legends, as well as confirmed that it will be available for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam when it launches.

Here is an overview of the game, via Aurogon Shanghai:

About

Set in the primordial age, a world drawn from the strange tales of classical Chinese literature, where mortals, gods, and wandering souls walk the same earth, the new Swords of Legends trailer provides a fresh look at the game’s combat, featured in a boss fight against Kong Kong Zi, Master of Cantrip, a theatrical adversary whose every move is staged as a piece of Traditional Chinese Conjuring, the centuries-old Chinese tradition of close-up stage magic. The Master of Cantrip is drawn from living traditions and grounded in a real cultural form, not invented from whole cloth.

Also revealed in this new Summer Game Fest trailer is the Spirit Companion system, which allows players to bring a soul from the spirit realm to fight by their side, intercepting damage and joining players in linked finishers against your enemy. Featured in the trailer is a first look at the abilities of the first spirit companion, the Ox, a spectral, horned fellow traveler of the netherworld.

The official sequel to the popular Gujian series, Swords of Legends is a single-player action-adventure RPG set in the primordial age, a world drawn from the strange tales of classical Chinese literature, where mortals, gods and wandering souls walk the same earth. Returned to the mortal realm by the Judge of King Yama, you walk again as a Sipan, an Arbiter of the Underworld, sent to seek out souls who cannot find their way home.

  • ❮
  • ❯

Key Features

  • Deep and Diverse Combat – As an Arbiter of the Underworld, you can unleash mystical techniques, summon spirit creatures, and wield an arsenal of weapons, each with its own playstyle, from the swords of the living to the artifacts of the dead. Read each enemy’s weakness, and weave your powers together to bring down every kind of enemy that crosses your path.
  • A Mythic East, Brought to Life in Cinematic Detail – Step into a world born of ancient Chinese myth, where the gods, demons, and beasts of The Classic of Mountains and Seas (Shan Hai Jing) walk the earth once more, and powered by Unreal Engine 5. Lotus ponds stretch to the horizon. Weathered temples drift with leaves. Lonely inns hide in the mountains. Mountain and river are the brush; light and shadow are the ink. Flower-spirits, headless ghosts, beauties with painted skin, a thousand faces of the living and the dead, woven into a scroll that spans both sides of death.
  • Guiding Their Souls, Find Your Own – Not every soul wants to leave. Some still cling to a final wish. Defeat them. Hear them out. Lay their burdens to rest, and the spirit you once fought will fight beside you. Each captured soul walks the mortal realm at your side, ready to take up arms again when battle calls. Their stories are mirrors. The more you ferry others through life and death, the harder it becomes to ignore the question waiting on your own road: what kind of life do you want to live?

Watch the trailer below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

Gameplay Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/swords-of-legends-confirmed-for-ps5-xbox-series-and-pc-gameplay-trailer
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Star Wars Zero Company launches August 27
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

Command the Clone Wars' most cunning operatives.

Single-player turn-based tactics game Star Wars Zero Company will launch for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam and Epic Games Store on August 27, publisher Electronic Arts and developers Bit Reactor and Respawn Entertainment announced. It will cost $49.99 on PC and $59.99 on consoles, with a Deluxe Edition available for $59.99 on PC and $69.99 on consoles.

“Our team has poured everything we love about Star Wars into Zero Company,” said Bit Reactor CEO and creative director Greg Foertsch in a press release. “The bold characters, powerful storytelling, striking settings and the sense of heart beneath the battles in Star Wars has helped us create an experience that pushes the tactics genre forward by combining deep gameplay with cinematic elegance. We’ve worked hand-in-hand with Lucasfilm Games to create an authentic Star Wars story packed with unique new characters, robust character customization, a new ship, Separatist Droids and much more, all rooted in the conflict of The Clone Wars.”

Lucasfilm Games vice president and general manager Douglas Reilly added, “Star Wars Zero Company delivers an entirely new experience in the galaxy and for our fans. It pairs cinematic storytelling with strategic gameplay in a way that feels fresh for the franchise. Some of the most interesting stories come from new perspectives, and Zero Company explores the Clone Wars from deep within the shadows of the conflict, through a lens we haven’t seen before, while still feeling completely authentic to the world fans know.”

  • ❮
  • ❯

Here is an overview of the game, via Electronic Arts:

Star Wars Zero Company’s visual storytelling and gameplay will immerse players in a tense, clandestine conflict taking place in the shadows of the Clone Wars. Players will step into the shoes of former Galactic Republic officer Hawks and current leader of Zero Company. Zero Company is an unconventional outfit of professionals for hire hailing from across the galaxy, including a Clone Trooper, a Mandalorian of the ancient Clan Verminoth, a Jedi Padawan and more. Together, Zero Company must hunt down and stop Kundri Fathom, leader of the Separatist-aligned cult, the Infinite Coil.

From Zero Company’s base of operations, The Den, players will recruit and progress skills of Operators, upgrade facilities, purchase new equipment and select their next mission from the holotable. On the battlefield, players will develop bonds between authored characters and player-created Operators, unlocking new support abilities, including cross-training benefits that improve their abilities and stats. Players will navigate an ever-changing galaxy map featuring more than 150 planets where each choice can change how their journey unfolds.

In Star Wars Zero Company customization is central to the experience. Hawks and recruited Operators can be created from eight iconic Star Wars species: Devaronian, Human, Neimoidian, Ovissian, Togruta, Twi’lek, Weequay and Zabrak. Voices, outfits and many other aspects of Hawks and an Operator’s appearance can be customized along with specializations and talents over time. It’s up to players to unite their Operators and form the best squad for the mission at hand.

Watch a new trailer below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

Gameplay Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/star-wars-zero-company-launches-august-27
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
